overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a luxurious corporate building. The scene transitions from a dark marble lobby with red neon accents through interior corridors and into a sunlit modern office with a high-tech conference room.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate lobby with red neon floor lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a dark marble lobby toward the glass entrance doors

entered.detail: large glass exit doors revealing bright outdoor light and a vehicle outside
glowing red neon strips embedded in the dark marble floor
polished dark marble flooring with light reflections
dark armored vehicle visible through the glass doors

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit corporate lobby with polished marble floors and glowing red neon accent lights. The camera moves forward toward large glass entrance doors where bright daylight and a parked security vehicle are visible outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: lobby perimeter with glass wall and reception area

events.description: camera turns right and begins walking along the glass wall away from the entrance

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking along the interior glass wall, passing the reception desk area

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling glass wall showing exterior view
dark modern reception desk with minimalist design
geometric patterned screen wall with backlighting

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right and proceeds along the glass perimeter wall, moving away from the entrance. A modern reception desk and decorative lattice wall come into view on the right while the red floor lights shift to the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior corridor with vertical slat walls

events.description: enters darker interior corridor away from the glass wall

agents.ego_description: walking through a dimly lit corridor with red accent lighting, approaching a glass door at the end

entered.detail: dark vertical wooden or metal slats covering the walls
glass door at the end of the corridor leading to a brighter space

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a darker, enclosed corridor with vertical slat walls and subtle red accent lighting. The camera moves forward toward a glass door at the far end that reveals a brightly lit space beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: executive lounge with conference area and city views

events.description: enters bright modern office space with large windows and indoor plants
approaches and stops at the conference table with holographic display

agents.ego_description: entering a sunlit executive office and approaching the central conference table with holographic interfaces

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling windows with bright morning sunlight and city view
large potted plants in rectangular planters
futuristic cyan neon light strips on the ceiling
large rectangular conference table with holographic display interface
modern executive chairs around the conference table

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a spacious, sunlit executive lounge through a glass door, revealing large windows with city views, indoor plants, and modern furnishings. The space features cyan neon ceiling accents and a large conference table with holographic displays that the camera approaches.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moody, neon-lit corporate interior that gradually opens into a bright, high-tech executive suite. It begins in a dimly lit lobby with polished marble floors and glowing red accents, moving forward toward glass entrance doors that reveal bright daylight and a security vehicle outside. As the camera turns right to follow the glass perimeter wall, the red floor lights shift position while a modern reception desk and decorative lattice wall emerge. The scene then transitions into a darker, enclosed corridor with vertical slat walls before moving toward a distant glass door that reveals a brightly lit space beyond. Finally, the camera enters a spacious, sunlit executive lounge filled with indoor plants and city views, gliding past cyan neon ceiling accents toward a large conference table with holographic displays.
